---
title: Creating signature matrix for CIBERSORTX
date: 2024-06-17
metadata-files: 
  - _metadata.yml
  - ../_quarto.yml
---

## Goal of this analysis

1. Find Markers for all clusters
2. Visualize in heatmap

## Files and directories

### Input

CCA RL file is found at `/.mounts/labs/pailab/private/llau/results/integrated/20240613/cca/combined_clusters_rl.qs`

### Output

The output can be found at `/.mounts/labs/pailab/private/llau/results/integrated/20240617`

## Process and Results

Lets load in the required libraries
```{r eval=FALSE}
library(tidyverse)
library(Seurat)
library(qs)
library(presto)
```

```{r eval=FALSE}
out_directory <- "/.mounts/labs/pailab/private/llau/results/integrated/20240617"
rl_cca <- qread("/.mounts/labs/pailab/private/llau/results/integrated/20240613/cca/combined_clusters_rl.qs")

ortho_csv <- read.csv("/u/llau/software/mb_scrnaseq/MB_scRNAseq/scrnaseq_Leo/utilities/20240402_hgnc_mgi_orth_genes.csv")

ortho_integ <- subset(rl_cca, features = ortho_csv$HGNC.symbol)

ortho_integ  <- NormalizeData(ortho_integ, assay = "RNA")

ortho_integ$new_clusters <- factor(ortho_integ$new_clusters, levels = unique(ortho_integ$new_clusters))

ortho_markers <- wilcoxauc(
  ortho_integ,
  group_by = "new_clusters",
  assay = "data",
  seurat_assay = "RNA"
)
```

```{r eval=FALSE}
ortho_markers %>%
    group_by(group) %>%
    dplyr::filter(auc > 0.6) %>%
    slice_head(n = 20) %>%
    ungroup() -> top_features
write.csv(top_features, file = paste0(out_directory, "/top_features_markers.csv"))
DoHeatmap(ortho_integ, features = top_features$feature, group.by = "new_clusters", assay = "RNA", slot = "data") + NoLegend()
ggsave(file.path(out_directory, "marker_heatmap.png"), width = 30, height = 30, units = "in", dpi = 600)
```

![This Heatmap does not look the best. It seems like within each Cluster, there are multiple programs](/.mounts/labs/pailab/private/llau/results/integrated/20240617/marker_heatmap.png)

Lets try subsetting out only human cells and see if that helps.
```{r eval=FALSE}
ortho_human <- subset(ortho_integ, subset = species == "human")

ortho_human <- NormalizeData(ortho_human, assay = "RNA")

ortho_human$new_clusters <- factor(ortho_human$new_clusters, levels = unique(ortho_human$new_clusters))

ortho_human_markers <- wilcoxauc(
  ortho_human,
  group_by = "new_clusters",
  assay = "data",
  seurat_assay = "RNA"
)
```

```{r eval=FALSE}
ortho_human_markers %>%
    group_by(group) %>%
    dplyr::filter(auc > 0.6) %>%
    slice_head(n = 20) %>%
    ungroup() -> top_features
write.csv(top_features, file = paste0(out_directory, "/top_human_features_markers.csv"))
DoHeatmap(ortho_human, features = top_features$feature, group.by = "new_clusters", assay = "RNA", slot = "data") + NoLegend()
ggsave(file.path(out_directory, "marker_human_heatmap.png"), width = 30, height = 30, units = "in", dpi = 600)
```

![This human only heatmap looks a lot better](/.mounts/labs/pailab/private/llau/results/integrated/20240617/marker_human_heatmap.png)
